# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals"
    apiVersion: "2018-02-01"
    name: "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
    properties:
      appId: "[guid(parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]"
      description: "Service Principal for CI/CD Pipeline"
  
  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('roleAssignmentId'), parameters('servicePrincipalId'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/CONTRIBUTOR_ROLE_ID"
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals/', parameters('servicePrincipalId')), '2018-02-01').id]"
  
parameters:
  servicePrincipalName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Name of the Service Principal"
  servicePrincipalId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "ID of the Service Principal"
  roleAssignmentId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Unique ID for the role assignment"

outputs:
  servicePrincipalAppId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals/', parameters('servicePrincipalId')), '2018-02-01').appId]"
